positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a majestic mountain landscape silhouette filled with abstract geometric constellations and celestial bodies. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, cosmic teal, and contrasting glowing gold accents. The foreground features stylized, simplified flora silhouettes. Minimalist, high contrast, vector art aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Flat graphic design style with ethereal glowing details. Central composition, centered and balanced, strong sense of depth achieved through overlapping layers. --ar 1:1 --v 6.0
negative: blurry, noise, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, logos, signatures, copyright, messy, sketch, photo, realism, painting
